description: Recto and verso: Draft of a legal document. Abu Saʿd al-Levi undertakes to provide his elderly father Shemuel with food and drink and the money for the capitation tax, since his father had traveled widely on business and was too exhausted for regular work. This fragment also contains an unrelated legal document dated 1232 CE (see separate PGP record). (Information from Mediterranean Society, vol. 5, pp. 122–23, and from Goitein's index cards.)
tags: disability: vision, jaliya, jizya, elder, disability, tax, capitation tax
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
